help: Record identification entries for an externally described file (positions 7-16 and 21-22). Identifies the external record format that RPG function is added to.

parameters.name: RCDNAME
parameters.help: The name of the external record format being extended.

parameters.name: RECIDIND
parameters.help: The indicator set on when the record is read.

parameters.name: COMMENT
parameters.help: The comment area of the specification (positions 81-100).
